title: IKEA India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: IKEA India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at IKEA India are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Vadodara. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About IKEA India:
IKEA India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IKEA India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
